MERIDIAN - Urgent Payment Notice

Dear Golden Customer,

We have not yet received payment for invoice INV-GOLDEN totalling £500.00, which is
now 30 days overdue. This requires your immediate attention.

Failure to settle this balance promptly may result in service restrictions. Please arrange
payment today or contact our support team to discuss your account.
